summary_text: Not fully complete yet. After `4770f621`, **one high-priority task remains** before calling the objective complete. `run-scoped phase evidence` is now materially fixed and covered: bridge checks `runId`-scoped evidence ([fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L694)), guard supports scoped validation ([guard.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/guard.js#L87)), and tests exist ([test-bridge-guard.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-bridge-guard.mjs#L35), [test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs#L39)). The exit-code correctness fix is also in place and tested ([fugue-execute.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L390), [test-canon-v4-smoke.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-canon-v4-smoke.mjs#L150)). The remaining high risk is **tier-policy source-of-truth bypass on recipe matrix path**. Phase gating in bridge depends on `matrix.tier` ([fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L694)). Default matrices now include `tier/runId`, but recipe-built implementation matrices still do not carry them by construction ([recipe-loader.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/recipe-loader.mjs#L127), [phase-runner.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs#L263)). That can silently skip Tier>=3 evidence enforcement for recipe flows. There is currently no `--recipe` test coverage in `scripts/tests`. If you want objective-closed confidence for production, this is the issue to execute now. All other items I see are lower priority than this one.
